'''√dh-b-g''' ('''kadhabag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:larvate|larvate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-b-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:larvate|larvate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √dh-b-g
|-
! Lemma
| kadhabag
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thidhabag || jidhabag || shidhabag || kidhabag
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthudhabag || jujudhabag || shushudhabag || kukudhabag
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thudhabag || judhabag || shudhabag || kudhabag
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thudhabag || judhabag || shudhabag || kudhabag
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thedhabag || jedhabag || shedhabag || kedhabag
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothodhabag || jojodhabag || shoshodhabag || kokodhabag
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thodhabag || jodhabag || shodhabag || kodhabag
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thodhabag || jodhabag || shodhabag || kodhabag
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || dhabag || dhabag || dhabag || dhabag
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || dhabag || dhabag || dhabag || dhabag
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || dhabag || dhabag || dhabag || dhabag
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || dhabag || dhabag || dhabag || dhabag
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thædhabag || jædhabag || shædhabag || kædhabag
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathadhabag || jajadhabag || shashadhabag || kakadhabag
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thadhabag || jadhabag || shadhabag || kadhabag
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thadhabag || jadhabag || shadhabag || kadhabag
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shadhabag
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshadhabag
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishadhabag
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shadhabagnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshadhabagnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishadhabagnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shadhabagshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshadhabagnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishadhabagshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shadhabagro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshadhabagnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishadhabagro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shadhabagmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshadhabagnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishadhabagmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shadhabagsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshadhabagnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishadhabagsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shadhabagng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshadhabagnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishadhabagng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shadhabagya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshadhabagnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishadhabagya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shadhabagyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshadhabagnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishadhabagyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shadhabagnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshadhabagnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishadhabagnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shadhabagnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshadhabagnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishadhabagnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shadhabagnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshadhabagnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishadhabagnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shadhabagshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshadhabagnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishadhabagshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shadhabagshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshadhabagnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishadhabagshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shadhabagshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshadhabagnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishadhabagshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shadhabagronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshadhabagnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishadhabagronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shadhabagroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshadhabagnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishadhabagroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shadhabagromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshadhabagnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishadhabagromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shadhabagmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshadhabagnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishadhabagmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shadhabagmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshadhabagnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishadhabagmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shadhabagmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshadhabagnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishadhabagmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
